zh.lifeSummary: 當Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary於1088年出生在匈牙利可馬洛-斯特格姆艾斯特格姆時，她的父親Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király42歲，母親Adelaide von Rheinfelden23歲。她於1104年5月與Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár在匈牙利可馬洛-斯特格姆艾斯特格姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1134年8月13日在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه易斯坦波爾易斯坦波爾享年46歲，埋葬在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه易斯坦波爾易斯坦波爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary于1088年出生在匈牙利可馬洛-斯特格姆艾斯特格姆时，她的父亲Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király42岁，母亲Adelaide von Rheinfelden23岁。她于1104年5月与Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár在匈牙利可馬洛-斯特格姆艾斯特格姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1134年8月13日在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه易斯坦波爾易斯坦波爾享年46岁，埋葬在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه易斯坦波爾易斯坦波爾。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Irene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek eirēnē ‘peace’ it was borne in Greek mythology by a minor goddess who personified peace, and by a Byzantine empress ( 752–803 ). The name was taken up in the English-speaking world at the end of the 19th century, and became popular in the 20th, partly as a result of being used as the name of a character in John Galsworthy's The Forsyte Saga ( 1922 ). It was formerly pronounced in three syllables, as in Greek, but is now thoroughly naturalized as an English name and usually pronounced as two syllables.

en.lifeSummary: When Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary was born in 1088, in Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungary, her father, Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király, was 42 and her mother, Adelaide von Rheinfelden, was 23. She married Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár in May 1104, in Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungary. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 13 August 1134, in İstanbul, İstanbul, Ottoman Empire, at the age of 46, and was buried in İstanbul, İstanbul, Ottoman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary est née en 1088, à Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hongrie, son père, Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Adelaide von Rheinfelden, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár en mai 1104, à Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hongrie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 août 1134, à İstanbul, İstanbul, Empire ottoman, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à İstanbul, İstanbul, Empire ottoman.

de.lifeSummary: Als Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary 1088 in Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Ungarn geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király 42 und ihre Mutter Adelaide von Rheinfelden 23. Sie hat im Mai 1104 in Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Ungarn Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. August 1134 im Alter von 46 Jahren in İstanbul, İstanbul, Osmanisches Reich und wurde in İstanbul, İstanbul, Osmanisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary è nata il nel 1088 nel Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Ungheria, sua padre, Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Adelaide von Rheinfelden, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár nel maggio 1104, nel Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Ungheria. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 13 agosto 1134, nel İstanbul, İstanbul, Impero ottomano, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a İstanbul, İstanbul, Impero ottomano.

ja.lifeSummary: Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungaryが1088年にハンガリーコムaロム-エスズテルゴムエスズテルゴムで生まれた時，父Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar királyは42歳，母Adelaide von Rheinfeldenは23歳であった。1104年5月にハンガリーコムaロム-エスズテルゴムエスズテルゴムでKomnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császárと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1134年8月13日にオスマン帝国イスタンブルイスタンブルで46歳で死去し，オスマン帝国イスタンブルイスタンブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary(이)가 1088년 헝가리 코a롬-스즈터고 스즈터고에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide von Rheinfelden(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1104년 5월 헝가리 코a롬-스즈터고 스즈터고에서 Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1134년 8월 13일 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه 이스탠불 이스탠불에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه 이스탠불 이스탠불에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary nasceu em 1088, em Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungria, seu pai, Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide von Rheinfelden, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár em maio de 1104, em Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1134, em İstanbul, İstanbul, Império Otomano, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em İstanbul, İstanbul, Império Otomano.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary родилась в 1088 г. в местности эсзтиргом, комaром-есзтиргом, Венгрия, её отцу по имени Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Adelaide von Rheinfelden, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár май 1104 г. в местности эсзтиргом, комaром-есзтиргом, Венгрия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 13 августа 1134 г. в местности истанбул, истанбул, Османская империя в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности истанбул, истанбул, Османская империя.

sm.1090-1134: mai le 1090 e o'o I le 1134

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary nació en 1088, en Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungría, su papá, Árpád-házi I.Szent László Magyar király, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Adelaide von Rheinfelden, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár en mayo de 1104, en Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungría. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1134, en İstanbul, İstanbul, Imperio otomano, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en İstanbul, İstanbul, Imperio otomano.
